falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 swing low invalidates the 80% bottom pattern match, as that level held in the reference pattern; this would signal structural weakness rather than bottoming behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear readings contradict a bottom_2024_aug pattern which featured VIX spike-and-fade; persistent elevated VIX indicates ongoing panic, not capitulation and reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50 basis points and holds there for 5+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion contradicts the bottoming narrative; August 2024 saw curve steepening as growth fears eased, so further inversion signals recession acceleration that invalidates the recovery pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
